sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70977" key="nomoai/olos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νομο-αίολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<sense id="n70977.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νόμος</quote_> <bibl n="http://www.trismegistos.org/text/38396" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of varied melody,</tr_> dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0377.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telest.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
